summary: Plan-only inventory classification over five open PRs. No merge is recommended because no candidate has the required complete merge preflight with Codex /review evidence. The prior fix_needed placeholders were downgraded to non-mutating classifications because no complete executable fix_artifact is safe from the provided artifacts. #84009 additionally needs maintainer judgment because it is broad and marked waiting on author.
